etymology.description: semantic иҫө(иҫө) (chuГІ, "walk; movement") + phonetic еҶ“(еҶ“) (gГІu) = to encounter while walking -> to meet; to encounter
etymology.interpretation: The character йҒҳ(gГІu, "to meet; to encounter") combines the semantic component иҫө(иҫө) (chuГІ, "walk; movement"), representing movement or traveling, with the phonetic component еҶ“(еҶ“) (gГІu), to convey the meaning of meeting or encountering, presumably while on a journey.
